arts.ttl: Real Madrid rejected a January transfer approach from PSG
arts.sum: The brass at La Liga giants Real Madrid rebuffed a winter approach for a member of the club’s defensive ranks on the part of French champions Paris Saint-Germain. That’s according…

arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti speaks out as Real Madrid star suffers injury scare ahead of Girona
arts.sum: Real Madrid head coach Carlo Ancelotti has on Saturday provided an update on the wellbeing of midfielder Dani Ceballos. This comes after the Spaniard momentarily set alarm bells sounding in…

Real Madrid dropped points last time out after Jude Bellingham was sent off in the first half. Away to Osasuna, Kylian Mbappe opened the scoring, but they failed to hold on after going down to 10 men ...

arts.ttl: Saudi clubs ‘assure’ they could pay Real Madrid star’s €1 billion clause
arts.sum: A fresh insight into the ongoing speculation linking Real Madrid star Vinícius Jr. with a move to Saudi Arabia has this weekend been forthcoming. The info comes courtesy of Relevo,…

arts.ttl: Man City hit with new transfer blow as 27-year-old 'to do everything possible' for Real Madrid switch
arts.sum: AC Milan left-back Theo Hernandez is reportedly pining for a return to Real Madrid this summer, despite reported interest from the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Official: Real Madrid name strong squad to face Girona
arts.sum: La Liga champions Real Madrid have on Saturday unveiled the club’s latest squad. This comes ahead of an upcoming meeting with Girona. Real Madrid are set to return to action…

arts.ttl: Ancelotti: “Atlético Madrid in the Champions League will be a nice, balanced tie”
arts.sum: Real Madrid manager Carlo Ancelotti spoke to the media ahead of their match vs Girona at the Santiago Bernabeu on Sunday afternoon. The important thing is that the club, the players above all, and also the fans are happy with my work.”

arts.ttl: Endrick opens up on limited Real Madrid role
arts.sum: Endrick gives his thoughts on his limited role at Real Madrid.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid-Atlético in Champions League last 16
arts.sum: Real Madrid will face Atlético in the last 16 of the Champions League with the first leg being held at the Santiago Bernabéu stadium on March 4th at 9pm CET, and the second leg at the Metropolitano on March 12th also at 9pm CET. As for previous meetings, Real Madrid and Atlético have faced each other nine times in the history of the European Cup, including the finals of our tenth and eleventh European Cup wins.

arts.ttl: Ancelotti: No room for error in three-way title race
arts.sum: Carlo Ancelotti said the LaLiga title race has "reached a point where you can't slip up" as Real Madrid, Barcelona and Atlético Madrid go into this weekend's games with just a point between them at the top of the table.
